UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile in the Padel Hore.

uid.description: The user's unique ID from Firebase Authentication.

phId.description: The user's unique Padel Hore ID (e.g., PH-XXXX).

name.description: The display name of the user.

showWhatsapp.description: Whether to show the user's WhatsApp number on their public profile.

total_points.description: The total accumulated points of the user.

tier.description: The user's tier status (beginner, lower bronze, bronze, silver, gold).

win_count.description: The number of matches won by the user.

match_count.description: The total number of matches played by the user.

photoURL.description: The URL for the user's custom avatar image.

fcmTokens.description: An array of Firebase Cloud Messaging tokens for push notifications.

fair_play_count.description: The number of times the user has been awarded for fair play.

early_bird_count.description: The number of matches the user has played in the morning.

night_owl_count.description: The number of matches the user has played at night.

eventAttendanceCount.description: The number of events the user has attended.

skillLevel.description: A manually assigned skill level for the player (1.0-5.0).

membershipExpiryDate.description: The date when the user's membership expires.

isUnlimitedMember.description: Grants the user lifetime membership, bypassing the expiry date.

badges.description: A list of badges earned by the user.

badgeId.description: The unique ID of the earned badge.

Match.title: Match
Match.description: Represents a match between two teams of players.

timestamp.description: The date and time of the match (Firestore timestamp).

team_1.description: An array containing the user UIDs of the players in team 1.

team_2.description: An array containing the user UIDs of the players in team 2.

player_ids.description: An array containing all user UIDs for easier querying.

winner_team.description: Indicates which team won the match (Team 1 or Team 2).

margin.description: The score difference between the winning and losing teams.

host_id.description: The ID of the player who hosted the match.

on_time_players.description: Array of player IDs who were on time for the match.

fair_play_players.description: Array of player IDs who demonstrated fair play.

slot_filler_players.description: Array of player IDs who were slot fillers for the match.

point_breakdown.description: An object detailing the points awarded to each player for the match.

courtId.description: The ID of the court where the match was played.

courtName.description: The name of the court where the match was played.

courtLocation.description: The location of the court where the match was played.

eventId.description: The ID of the event this match is part of.

eventName.description: The name of the event this match is part of.

roundNumber.description: The round number this match belongs to within an event.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Represents a notification for a user.

uid.description: The ID of the user this notification is for.

body.description: The optional body content of the notification.

timestamp.description: Firestore timestamp of when the notification was created.

isRead.description: Whether the user has read the notification.

link.description: An optional link to navigate to when the notification is clicked.

linkButtonText.description: The optional custom text for the notification's action button.

location.description: The location or address of the court.

startDate.description: The start date of the season.

endDate.description: The end date of the season.

isActive.description: Indicates if this is the currently active season.

TierThresholds.title: Tier Thresholds
TierThresholds.description: Defines the minimum and maximum points for each player tier.

AppSettings.title: App Settings
AppSettings.description: Stores global application settings like maintenance mode and contact numbers.

isMaintenanceMode.description: If true, the app will be in maintenance mode for non-admins.

maintenanceMessage.description: The message to display to users during maintenance mode.

membershipWhatsappNumber.description: The WhatsApp number for membership admin.

shopWhatsappNumber.description: The WhatsApp number for shop admin.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: Represents a club event like a tournament, social gathering, or coaching clinic.

description.description: A detailed description of the event.

status.description: The current status of the event.

startDate.description: The start date and time of the event.

endDate.description: The end date and time of the event.

maxParticipants.description: The maximum number of participants allowed.

participantIds.description: An array of user UIDs who are confirmed participants.

waitlistIds.description: An array of user UIDs on the waiting list.

attendancePoints.description: Bonus points awarded for attending the event.

pointMultiplier.description: Multiplier for points earned in matches within this event (e.g., 1.5, 2).

bannerUrl.description: URL for the event's banner image.

galleryUrls.description: An array of URLs for images in the event gallery.

courtId.description: The ID of the court where the event is held.

rounds.description: Defines the structure of rounds within the event.

byePlayerIds.description: Array of user UIDs who have a bye in this round.

EventRegistration.title: Event Registration
EventRegistration.description: Represents a user's registration for a specific event.

userId.description: The UID of the registered user.

userName.description: The name of the registered user.

userPhotoUrl.description: The photo URL of the registered user.

attended.description: Whether the user has checked in and attended the event.

checkInTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the user checked in.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product in the club shop.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

price.description: The price of the product in IDR.

status.description: The stock status of the product.

poEstimate.description: Estimated delivery time for pre-order items (e.g., '2-3 weeks').

variations.description: Defines product variations like size or color.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer's order for a product.

orderId.description: A unique ID for the order.

userId.description: The ID of the user who placed the order.

userName.description: The name of the user who placed the order.

productId.description: The ID of the ordered product.

productName.description: The name of the ordered product.

productImage.description: The image URL of the ordered product.

priceAtOrder.description: The price of a single item at the time of order.

totalPrice.description: The total price for the order.

selectedVariation.description: The selected variations for the product (e.g., {'Size': 'L', 'Color': 'Black'}).

status.description: The current status of the order.

trackingNumber.description: The shipping tracking number, if applicable.

definition.description: Stores user profile data, including points and roles. Publicly readable, but only the user or an admin can write.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user (their UID).

definition.description: Stores match data. Publicly readable, but only admins can write.

params.name: matchId
params.description: The unique identifier for the match (document ID).

definition.description: Stores notifications for a specific user. Only readable/writable by that user.
Stores information about available padel courts. Publicly readable, but only admins can write.
Stores competitive season data. Publicly readable, admin-only write.
Stores global application settings, like tier point thresholds. Publicly readable, admin-only write.

params.name: settingId
params.description: The ID of the setting document (e.g., 'tier_thresholds').

definition.description: Stores global application settings. Publicly readable, admin-only write.
Stores all club events. Publicly readable, admin-only write.
Stores user registrations for an event. Authenticated users can read and create their own. Admins can manage all.

params.name: registrationId
params.description: The registration document ID (often the user's UID).

definition.description: Stores all club shop products. Publicly readable, admin-only write.
Stores customer orders. Users can read their own orders. Admins can read all.
